edges.description: The reported missense variant is predicted to impair CDH23-mediated cell-cell adhesion.
The mechanistic path from altered CDH23 adhesion to pituitary adenoma formation is not established.
edges.target: Pituitary adenoma susceptibility with unresolved mechanism

meta.association: Germline CDH23 variants have been reported as risk-associated variants in familial and sporadic pituitary adenoma cohorts, but the mechanism is not yet established to the same level as AIP, GPR101, GNAS, or USP8.

evidence.reference_title: Germline Mutations in CDH23, Encoding Cadherin-Related 23, Are Associated with Both Familial and Sporadic Pituitary Adenomas.
evidence.snippet: Therefore, mutations in CDH23 are linked with familial and sporadic PA and could play important roles in the pathogenesis of PA.

nodes.description: Heterozygous germline CDH23 missense variants are associated with familial and sporadic pituitary adenoma in the reported cohort.

evidence.reference_title: Germline Mutations in CDH23, Encoding Cadherin-Related 23, Are Associated with Both Familial and Sporadic Pituitary Adenomas.
evidence.snippet: identified cosegregation of the PA phenotype with the heterozygous missense mutation c.4136G>T (p.Arg1379Leu) in cadherin-related 23 (CDH23).

evidence.reference_title: Germline Mutations in CDH23, Encoding Cadherin-Related 23, Are Associated with Both Familial and Sporadic Pituitary Adenomas.
evidence.snippet: 33% of the families with familial PA (4/12) and 12% of individuals with sporadic PA (15/125) harbored functional CDH23 variants.

genetic_context.description: Reported CDH23 variants are germline missense variants; the disease mechanism and penetrance are unresolved.

nodes.description: CDH23 variants are associated with pituitary adenoma risk, but the specific pituitary cell type, signaling route, and tumorigenic intermediate states remain unresolved.
nodes.id: Pituitary adenoma susceptibility with unresolved mechanism

evidence.reference_title: Germline Mutations in CDH23, Encoding Cadherin-Related 23, Are Associated with Both Familial and Sporadic Pituitary Adenomas.
evidence.snippet: Therefore, mutations in CDH23 are linked with familial and sporadic PA and could play important roles in the pathogenesis of PA.

nodes.description: A proposed proximal effect of CDH23 variants is altered cadherin-mediated cell-cell adhesion, but this is a prediction and not yet a validated pituitary tumorigenesis mechanism.

evidence.reference_title: Germline Mutations in CDH23, Encoding Cadherin-Related 23, Are Associated with Both Familial and Sporadic Pituitary Adenomas.
evidence.snippet: This mutation causes an amino acid substitution in the calcium-binding motif of the extracellular cadherin (EC) domains of CDH23 and is predicted to impair cell-cell adhesion.
